text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little village, there was a quirky old cat named Mittens. Mittens was more than just a feline; she was a bit of an eccentric character. Every morning, she would meow with excitement as she leaped onto her owner's outstretched arm, purring softly to herself.

One sunny morning, Mittens danced around her house excitedly as usual, when something suddenly seemed amiss. She scratched at the windowspan with urgency, and out ran a group of curious villagers, puzzled by her frantic activity.

"What's wrong, Mittens?" asked Mrs. Butterworth.

"Mmm," Mittens replied with a half-sneer half-smile. "I’ve had this itch in my head, but it’s not just some ordinary itch. It’s a tiny fairy wriggling within!"
